roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
DEF MOTION FOR OR RELEASE, FILED
/CAL:TRAILING #17002169 & DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/CTORD:DEFENDANT'S GPS IS TERMINATED AND REMOVED/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 23 & TRLG #17002169 IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL: DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR BAIL HEARING OR RELEASE ON O,R, (PRE-PX M20)/MOGRTD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO HOME DETENTION, NO DRUGS,/X: FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/

/CAL:PTC/X:OUTSIDE THE PRESENCE OF ADA, COURT CONDUCTS AN IN CAMERA HEARING FOR MARSEN MOTION,/X:MARSDEN MOTION IS DENIED,/X:COURT CONFIRMS HEARINGDATE OF 02-10-20,/4011,5/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAMPURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:02-10-20/RET22/
/CAL: PTC/X: MCKENZIE MOTION IS HEARD IN A CLOSED COURTROOM SETTING AND ISGRANTED BY THE COURT/X: PREVIOUS COUNSEL, BETSY WOLKIN IS RELIEVED OF THIS CASE/CON: DAVID HARRISON/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER//NTW60/LDPX:07-19-19/987,2/BAIL:50,000/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARED A CONFLICT IN THIS MATTER,/CON: BETSY WOLKIN/NP/CAUSE/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:05-20-19/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT ON 05-20-19, D11/TWA/DOP/
/CAL:TRAILING 17002169, PRE-PX M20/CONTD:TRAILING 17002129 & DEFENSE MOTION MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/DAWF/
/CAL:PTC/DAWT/VD:HEARING DATE OF 01-28-20/CONTD:PTC ON 01-31-20/DOPC/CONTD:TO SET JURY TRIAL ON 02-10-20/DOPC/
/CAL: TRAILING 17002169/X: COURT CONFIRMS FUTURE HEARING DATE,/
/CAL:PTC, TRAILING 17002169/CONTD:IN DEPT 11 TO SET PX ON 6-21-19/CONTD:IN DEPT 22 ON 6-21-19, TRAILING 17002169/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/CAUSE/SHER/BAIL:50000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
